data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user experience by reducing decision time.
data.technical_spec: Minimization of choices presented to users on the main interface.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Highlights importance of design efficiency in target acquisition.
data.technical_spec: Designs larger buttons and clickable areas for essential tasks.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Focuses on aligning the site experience with user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface design based on common user interaction patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements close to each other are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Grouper content and features that naturally belong together.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Chunking information to capitalize on user's working memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Breakdown of information into smaller, digestible parts.
